# Jargon Glossary — DRAFT (machine-seeded via Azure AI Language)

**Generated by:** `scripts/podcast/seed_glossary.py`
**Service:** Azure AI Language — Key Phrase Extraction (KPE) + Named Entity Recognition (NER) v3.1

This file is a **draft**. The operator copies relevant rows into the curated `jargon-glossary.md` and adds: (1) the TTS respelling (per `SHARED_ARABIC/01-tts-pronunciation-key.md` rules — hyphenated syllables, CAPS-marking the stressed syllable), (2) the listener primer (one-sentence concept tag). Phrases and entities are emitted verbatim; deduplication is case-insensitive.
